3137050.name: Magicland
3137050.description:
Have you ever wanted to do anything you've ever wanted to do?

Yes? Then come visit Magicland! The #1 destination for any adventurers looking to master the amazing skill of magic.

Magicland is a 2D-3D puzzle adventure. The goal of the game is to explore your surroundings and solve puzzles to advance the story. Your main goal is to find the great wizards to learn more spells and become more powerful, then use those powers to unlock new areas to explore. Sound fun yet? Well we're just getting started!

Magicland features a modern open world plan once you leave the starting area. This means you will also gain powers that make exploring the land much faster and easier.

Come see our beloved Goblin Town, Farm area, or even the mystical $̸̹͓̞̄̅̽̕͠͝͠(̴͇̗͇̘̒̇́̈́̿̊̈́̋#̸̘̩̔̈̒)̷͕̳̩̝̳͐̈́*̵͚̜̠̰̬̞̪͍͓̇̊͗ͅ%̴͇͎̯̈̇̍̿̓&̸̢̥̟̺̥̀̾̈̈́̐͂̇͝)̴̛̤̪̠̏̐̔͌̏(̶̨̢̨̤̻̼̦̈́̏̈́̄̊͠Ḋ̶͓̱̼͎̈́̓̄̓͆G̸̪̼͎̭͌̌̓͋ͅF̸̧̛̱̩͂̈͂̿͌͌̿̔̽S̵̏ͅ)̸̢̧̢̣̖̦̺̀̉̎͛͒̿̓̓͝D̸̘̣͉͙̭͖̍̏̀̐̄̏̓̕͝ͅG̸͈̹̦̳̣̋͛͂͠(̵̢̧̘̭̙̹̥̣̦͊̒D̵̥͓̓ͅS̴̙̈̓͗̒̍̌͊͘͘)̸̙͙̣̦̼̜̌̒͋̕͠ͅ Forest.

Join the adventure!
